commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=fcdf1f372df1bc3cbc10f92a3613044a7bb2a85f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR renames and expands heartbeat transcript filtering, applies it in embedded attempt history/prompt assembly, and adds regressions for response-tool heartbeat artifacts before normal prompt snapshots.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: a transcript containing a heartbeat prompt followed by meaningful assistant alert text is preserved on current main and would be filtered to an empty history by the PR loop. I did not run tests because this review was required to keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs author or maintainer changes plus contributor-supplied real behavior proof; ClawSweeper should not mark this as an automated repair lane while the external proof gate is still missing.

target.title: Filter heartbeat response-tool transcript artifacts
target.body:
## Summary

- Extend heartbeat transcript filtering to remove full response-tool heartbeat spans, including helper tool calls, tool results, `heartbeat_respond`, and post-tool continuations.
- Apply the renamed filter at the existing attempt history/context call sites and clear active session history when filtering removes all prior messages.
- Add unit and runner-context regressions for polluted heartbeat spans before normal prompt snapshots.

## Verification

- `pnpm install`
- `node --no-maglev node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/heartbeat-filter.test.ts src/auto-reply/heartbeat-filter.browser-import.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-injection.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts --run --reporter=verbose`
  - `Test Files  6 passed (6)`
  - `Tests  116 passed (116)`
- `pnpm format:check -- src/auto-reply/heartbeat-filter.ts src/auto-reply/heartbeat-filter.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-injection.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts`
- `OPENCLAW_OXLINT_SKIP_PREPARE=1 node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/auto-reply/heartbeat-filter.ts src/auto-reply/heartbeat-filter.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-injection.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: A heartbeat response-tool run persisted operational instructions and tool artifacts into the normal session transcript; later normal prompts could replay stale `heartbeat_respond` / `notify=false` context.

Real environment tested: Fresh branch `codex/filter-heartbeat-transcript-artifacts` from current `upstream/main` in a local OpenClaw checkout with dependencies installed.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node --no-maglev node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/heartbeat-filter.test.ts src/auto-reply/heartbeat-filter.browser-import.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-injection.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts --run --reporter=verbose`

Evidence after fix: The new runner-context regression seeds a heartbeat response-tool transcript span containing `HEARTBEAT.md`, `heartbeat_respond`, `notify:false`, `[OpenClaw heartbeat poll]`, and `No visible update. notify=false`; it asserts both context-engine assembly input and `messagesSnapshot` omit those artifacts while preserving the normal final prompt `what model are you`.

Observed result after fix: Targeted Vitest completed with `Test Files  6 passed (6)` and `Tests  116 passed (116)`.

What was not tested: Full changed lanes, Crabbox/Testbox, and live provider dispatch were not run; this patch is scoped to persisted transcript filtering and prompt snapshot assembly.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
